title: IIMA – Research Associate – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA) has released the Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Recruitment 2026 notification for 1 post. Candidates with a Master’s degree in Economics, Urban Planning, or MBA with data analytics/econometrics background can apply online through the official IIMA website before 15 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIMA Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA) has released the Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Recruitment 2026 notification for 1 post. Candidates with a Master’s degree in Economics, Urban Planning, or MBA with data analytics/econometrics background can apply online through the official IIMA website before 15 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in economics, urban planning, or business administration with significant coursework in econometrics and/or data analytics. Expertise in Stata/R required.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIMA Research Associate in Transportation Economics, Finance, and Policy Recruitment 2026.
